/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,fawkesnavgraph.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/lua/fawkesnavgraph.so CMakeFiles/fawkesnavgraph_tolua.dir/fawkesnavgraph_tolua.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnavgraph.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -llua-5.1 -ldl -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib64 -lyaml-cpp -lm -ltolua++ -lstdc++ -lm
